steps.title: Use the y-intercept
steps.content: The line contains $(0,3)$, so the y-intercept is $3$. In $f(x)=mx+b$, this means $b=3$.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: C is correct. It passes both point checks: $f(0)=3$ gives the intercept, and $f(7)=31$ confirms the slope calculation.
